actions_this_run.summary: remove the unreadable charaters on the top of page around upgrade plan and free tial 14 days areas

note: Agent-triage state. Re-written every hour by .github/workflows/agent-triage.yml. last_*_id values track the highest id seen per channel so the next run only processes truly-new items. initialized=false on the very first run; the workflow seeds the baseline to the current max id without processing the backlog to avoid spam-ACKing existing rows.
